text.title: PII Scrubbing Recipe Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: 500-row production sample → validated pii-scrub-spec.

section.title: Worked example
section.p: Team: Faion ML-engineering. Task: build eval harness for the `support-bot` agent from Q2 2026 production traffic.
Step 1. 500 rows sampled. Regex hits: 412 emails, 89 phones, 38 person-names (NER). Classification: 67% rows `high` density.
Step 2. Because high density > 30%, the procedure forces `regex_plus_ml`. Rules picked: `email`, `phone`, `credit_card`, `ml-ner-person`.
Step 3. Consent dict path: `git://faion/consent.yaml`. Flag field: `user.consent.eval_v1`. 47 rows dropped (consent flag false or missing).
Step 4. Legal policy: 365 days max for `support_traffic` class. Retention pinned at 365.
Result. Validator exits 0. Spec committed at `git://faion/specs/eval-set-support-bot-2026q2.json`. Downstream eval-harness build consumes it without re-deriving rationale.
